seo.title: Building Customer Support with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build customer support with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building customer support agents with Haystack enables scalable RAG pipelines that integrate CRM data, knowledge bases, and tool-calling for ticket management. However, failure modes like irrelevant retrievals, hallucinations, and PII leaks can damage trust and compliance. Vex provides runtime verification as a custom component to ensure response accuracy, policy compliance, and safe escalation.

architectureOverview.heading: Customer Support Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
The typical Haystack customer support pipeline starts with a user query routed through an EmbeddingsRetriever against a knowledge base of FAQs, product docs, and CRM-synced customer history. Retrieved documents feed a PromptBuilder that constructs context-aware prompts for an LLM like GPT-4, which generates responses and decides on tool calls for actions like ticket creation or order lookup via custom FunctionCalling components. A final Router component handles escalations to human agents based on confidence scores or trigger keywords.

CRM integration pulls customer-specific data (past tickets, orders) via API calls triggered by the LLM's tool decisions, while the knowledge base ensures factual grounding. The pipeline must filter PII from responses and maintain brand tone across interactions. Vex slots in as a verification component post-generation to check accuracy, compliance, and safety before response delivery.

risks.name: Retriever returning irrelevant documents
risks.description: Embedding mismatches return unrelated KB/CRM docs, causing inaccurate or off-topic responses
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity checks between query and top-k retrieved docs

risks.name: Generator hallucinating beyond retrieved context
risks.description: LLM fabricates order details or ticket status not grounded in retrieved context
risks.mitigation: Vex context faithfulness scoring and citation verification

risks.name: PII filtering failures
risks.description: Customer phone numbers, emails, or account IDs leak into responses
risks.mitigation: Vex PII entity extraction and redaction before delivery

risks.name: Tone/policy violations
risks.description: Responses use unprofessional language or violate brand escalation policies
risks.mitigation: Vex sentiment analysis and policy rule evaluation

implementation.title: Basic RAG Pipeline with CRM Context
implementation.description: Core Haystack pipeline with retriever, prompt builder, and tool-calling generator
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline, Document

from haystack.components.retrievers.in_memory import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator

# Mock CRM/customer data retrieval
crm_context = Document(content="Customer #12345: John Doe, last order #67890 on 2024-01-15")

retrieval = InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store=doc_store)
prompt_builder = PromptBuilder(template="Answer using context: {{documents}} and CRM: {{crm_context}}. Query: {{query}}")
generator = OpenAIGenerator(model="gpt-4o")

rag_pipeline = Pipeline()
rag_pipeline.add_component("retriever", retrieval)
rag_pipeline.add_component("prompt_builder", prompt_builder)
rag_pipeline.add_component("generator", generator)

rag_pipeline.connect("retriever", "prompt_builder.documents")
rag_pipeline.connect("prompt_builder", "generator")

vexIntegration.title: Vex Verifier as Custom Pipeline Component
vexIntegration.description: Add Vex verification after generation to check all critical requirements

vexIntegration.title: Full Pipeline with Vex Integration
vexIntegration.description: Complete customer support pipeline connecting all components with Vex guardrails
vexIntegration.code:
from haystack import Pipeline

# Initialize components (from previous examples)
full_pipeline = Pipeline()

full_pipeline.add_component("retriever", InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(doc_store))
full_pipeline.add_component("vex_verifier", VexVerifier(api_key="vex_abc123", project_id="cs-001"))
full_pipeline.add_component("generator", OpenAIGenerator(model="gpt-4o"))
full_pipeline.add_component("router", EscalationRouter())
full_pipeline.add_component("pii_filter", PIIFilter())

# Core flow
full_pipeline.connect("retriever", "vex_verifier.retrieved_docs")
full_pipeline.connect("vex_verifier", "generator")
full_pipeline.connect("generator.response", "router.response")
full_pipeline.connect("generator.response", "pii_filter.text")

# Conditional routing
full_pipeline.connect("pii_filter.cleaned_text", "vex_verifier.response")
full_pipeline.connect("router.has_escalated", "vex_verifier")  # Re-verify escalations

# Run pipeline
result = full_pipeline.run({
    "retriever": {"query": "Where is my order #67890?"},
    "vex_verifier": {"query": "Where is my order #67890?", "customer_id": "12345"}
})

if result["vex_verifier"]["approved"]:
    print(result["pii_filter"]["cleaned_text"])
else:
    print(f"Blocked: {result['vex_verifier']['feedback']}")

vexIntegration.title: Runtime Monitoring Dashboard Setup
vexIntegration.description: Configure Vex monitoring for production customer support metrics
vexIntegration.code:
from vex_sdk import VexClient

vex = VexClient(api_key="vex_abc123")

# Create customer support verification project
project = vex.create_project(
    name="Haystack Customer Support",
    risk_profile="high",
    verifications=[
        "response_accuracy",
        "pii_filtering",
        "tone_consistency",
        "policy_compliance",
        "escalation_triggers"
    ]
)

# Production monitoring query
metrics = vex.get_metrics(
    project_id="cs-001",
    time_window="24h",
    filters={"pipeline": "haystack-customer-support"}
)

print(f"Pass rate: {metrics['pass_rate']:.1%}")
print(f"Top failures: {metrics['top_failures']}")

# Alert on degradation
if metrics['pass_rate'] < 0.95:
    vex.trigger_alert(
        project_id="cs-001",
        message=f"Customer support guardrail degradation: {metrics['pass_rate']:.1%}"
    )

cta.heading: Secure Your Haystack Customer Support
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and protect your RAG agents from production failures.
